title: Investigate MoveTo Re-added on Replan Root Cause
description:
TSK-0121 (Remove MoveTo-to-origin from replans) was marked done in Sprint 51 Wave B but the fix didn't hold. The DecomposeBuild creative path has no MoveTo action, yet the plan summary shows [MoveTo → PlaceBlockx215 → GetStatus] and MoveTo(72,4,124) is dispatched every cycle. 

Root cause is NOT in DecomposeBuild — the creative path correctly omits MoveTo. Investigation needed: 
1. Check if PlannerRouter falls through to HtnPlanner (losing BuildGoal type) 
2. Check if DecomposerPlanner.ReplanAsync preserves originalGoal 
3. Check if any middleware injects MoveTo before enqueue 
4. Verify plan action count: creative path = 216 (215 PlaceBlock + 1 GetStatus), but log shows 217 — the extra action is MoveTo

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Created from Sprint 51 Wave B+ investigation. TSK-0121's fix (comment in DecomposeBuild creative path saying 'Removed MoveTo') was cosmetic only — the MoveTo was never in the creative code path. The real MoveTo injection point is elsewhere. Parent task TSK-0121 reopened.
